mapper.select:
SELECT a.item_cd , a.item_name , (SELECT code_nm FROM tb_common_code WHERE com_type_cd = 'item_type_cd' AND code = a.item_type_cd) AS item_type_name , x.test_item_join , CASE WHEN x.cnt IS NULL OR x.cnt = 0 THEN NULL WHEN x.cnt = 1 THEN x.first_test_item ELSE CONCAT(x.first_test_item, ' 외 ', (x.cnt - 1), '건') END AS test_item_summary , CASE WHEN x.cnt IS NULL OR x.cnt = 0 THEN '미등록' ELSE '등록' END AS regYn ,a.item_type_cd FROM tb_item_mst a OUTER APPLY ( SELECT cnt = COUNT(*) , first_test_item = (SELECT TOP (1) t.test_item FROM tb_test_type_method t WHERE t.item_cd = a.item_cd
AND ISNULL(t.test_item,'') <> ''
ORDER BY t.test_item) , test_item_join = STUFF(( SELECT ',' + t2.test_item FROM tb_test_type_method t2 WHERE t2.item_cd = a.item_cd
AND ISNULL(t2.test_item,'') <> ''
FOR XML PATH('') ), 1, 1, '') , any_test_type_method_id = (SELECT TOP (1) t3.test_type_method_id FROM tb_test_type_method t3 WHERE t3.item_cd = a.item_cd ORDER BY t3.test_type_method_id) FROM tb_test_type_method t0 WHERE t0.item_cd = a.item_cd ) x where 1=1
AND a.item_type_cd = #{itemTypeCd}
AND a.item_cd = #{itemCd}
AND a.item_name LIKE '%' + #{itemName} + '%'
AND ISNULL(x.cnt,0) > 0
AND ISNULL(x.cnt,0) = 0
order by a.item_cd

SELECT test_item ,test_method ,test_spec ,test_result ,dist_order ,item_cd ,test_date_string ,tester_name ,pass_state ,test_type_method_id ,qc_test_id FROM tb_test_type_method WHERE item_cd = #{itemCe} ORDER BY dist_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_test_type_method ( item_cd, test_item, test_method, test_spec, test_result, dist_order, test_date_string, qc_test_id, tester_name, pass_state, reg_id, upd_id ) VALUES ( #{itemCd}, #{testItem}, #{testMethod}, #{testSpec}, #{testResult}, #{distOrder}, #{testDateString}, #{qcTestId}, #{testerName}, #{passState}, #{userId}, #{userId} )
